source.summary: e-Invoice mandatory threshold reduced from ₹10 Cr to ₹5 Cr from 1st August 2023

rule.description: e-Invoice mandatory threshold ₹5 Cr (reduced from ₹10 Cr)

interpretation_note: ₹5 Cr = ₹5,00,00,000 = 500,000,000 paise. Supersedes THRESHOLD_EINVOICE_10CR_v1 which ended 2023-07-31. effective_from 2023-08-01 — no gap with predecessor.
